segment.source: Renders a symmetrical header bar with a centered, linkable brand name framed by two separately managed link groups on the left and right, plus an optional call-to-action button on the right. Use it for: classic or editorial site headers, brand-centered navigation with a handful of evenly balanced links. Prefer 'Centered Navigation Bar' when a single link list simply surrounds the brand; 'Navigation Bar' for a standard left-brand layout.
